headline: Brown And Brown Digital Plans Draw Focus After Citigroup Upgrade
summary: Brown & Brown (NYSE:BRO) is set to feature its Digital Marketing Director at the upcoming Digital Insurance Summit, highlighting the company’s focus on digital channels and customer engagement. Citigroup recently upgraded Brown & Brown, citing expectations for moderating cyclical pressures and more supportive sector conditions. Together, the conference appearance and analyst upgrade point to fresh attention on the company’s digital plans and broader insurance market positioning. Brown &...
